title: 2026 Oscars Best Costume Design Predictions
text: The costume design race for the 98th Academy Awards features two frontrunners gaining momentum in the competition. 'Sinners' and 'Frankenstein' are described as pulling ahead in the costume design category, with The Memorable Fits of both films generating significant buzz for their costume work. The predictions were last updated on March 2, 2026, just before final Oscar voting concluded. Final balloting took place from February 26 through March 5, with the 98th Academy Awards ceremony scheduled for March 15, hosted by Conan O'Brien on ABC. Avatar: Fire and Ash is also in consideration for the category. The predictions reflect the fluid nature of the awards race and are updated weekly by Variety's chief awards editor Clayton Davis.
